reviews.review_msg: Absolutely outstanding prof. I ended up having him for 5 classes, and to be honest, I wish I could have taken more with him. These comments are all bang-on. He will never make you feel wrong if you raise your hand with an answer. Caring prof, wants to help you. Go to his office hours and pick his brain for your essays & you'll get excellent marks.

He is honestly not a great prof and he will brag about it! He marks based off of what he thinks is right, not if the paper is actually well written. His feedback is not great, his lectures are go with the flow (even though there is an exam), and his grading criteria is MIA. He also just will not teach you anything so do not expect to learn.
